title: AutoStream Basic Plan
content: Basic plan costs $29 per month and includes up to 10 videos per month with 720p export quality.

title: AutoStream Pro Plan
content: Pro plan costs $79 per month and includes unlimited videos, 4K exports, and AI captions.

title: AutoStream Refund Policy
content: AutoStream does not provide refunds after 7 days from the subscription start date.

title: AutoStream Support Policy
content: 24/7 support is available only for customers on the Pro plan.
